headline: A Look At Welltower (WELL) Valuation As Q4 Beat And 2026 Growth Outlook Lift Investor Sentiment
summary: Why Welltower’s new credit facility matters for shareholders Welltower (WELL) has just closed a US$6.25b amended senior unsecured revolving credit facility, a move that reshapes its available liquidity and refinancing options following an upbeat fourth quarter and 2026 outlook. The company replaced existing credit arrangements with this larger revolving facility, which is split into a US$4.25b tranche maturing on March 6, 2030, and a US$2.0b tranche maturing on July 24, 2029. Each tranche...

headline: WELL Health Subsidiary WELLSTAR Expands National Billing Platform with Two Strategic Acquisitions, Now Serving Six Provinces
summary: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, March 17, 2026--WELL Health Technologies Corp. (TSX: WELL, OTCQX: WHTCF) (the "Company" or "WELL"), a digital healthcare company focused on positively impacting health outcomes by leveraging technology to empower healthcare practitioners and their patients globally, is pleased to announce that its majority-owned subsidiary WELLSTAR Technologies Corp. ("WELLSTAR") has completed two strategic medical billing acquisitions: PatientSERV Corporation ("PatientSERV") in Onta
